name: media-server
short_description: High-performance HLS media server with intelligent transcoding and remuxing for video and audio streaming.
long_description: Media Server is a FastAPI-based HTTP Live Streaming (HLS) platform that provides universal video and audio format support with intelligent processing. It automatically detects whether media files can be remuxed efficiently (zero-cost operation for H.264+AAC compatible formats) or require transcoding, then produces HLS-compatible segments ready for streaming. The system uses SQLite with Peewee ORM for persistent job queue management, implements a background worker thread for parallel transcoding with graceful shutdown and timeout detection, and provides a modern web player interface with real-time progress tracking and job cancellation. Additional features include path traversal protection, IP-based rate limiting, structured logging support, subtitle extraction, thumbnail generation, and configurable retention policies for automatic job cleanup.

modules.description: FastAPI web server with REST API endpoints for streaming, job management, health checks, and static file serving with path traversal protection and rate limiting.
Background worker that polls the SQLite job queue, executes FFmpeg transcoding/remuxing processes, tracks progress, handles graceful shutdown, and supports job cancellation with timeout detection.
Job management layer that auto-detects whether files can be remuxed or must be transcoded, maintains in-memory progress cache for responsive UI, and provides database persistence for job metadata.
Peewee ORM models defining the Job table and database operations including job claiming, stale job recovery, cleanup of old jobs, and queue statistics.
Centralized runtime configuration singleton with environment variable overrides for paths, worker concurrency, segment duration, job retention, rate limiting, and hardware acceleration settings.
Main web player interface using Video.js for HLS playback with file selection, real-time transcoding progress display, and job control features.
Client-side JavaScript handling file listing, job submission, progress polling, player control, and cancellation functionality with real-time UI updates.
Embeddable widget script for integrating the HLS player into external websites with configurable dimensions and playback options.
Demo page showcasing the embeddable player widget capabilities and integration examples.
Package initialization with version metadata and module exports.
Entry point script that launches the FastAPI server with automatic worker initialization.
